ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the question (e.g., perceptions of life, values) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was last updated */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is mandatory */,
  "order_in_survey" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_theme FOREIGN KEY ("theme") REFERENCES themes ("theme_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the theme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the theme was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the theme */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the theme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question category */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_categories_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the response */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the response */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the response */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answer_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer option */,
  "option_value" INTEGER /* Value of the answer option */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the option was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the option */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answer_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the survey was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question version */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was updated */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the updated question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_versions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was updated */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the updated survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
